criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b no longer passes the full prompt as a CLI argv value.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows the Gemini prompt body is supplied via spawnSync option input: prompt, while argv contains only a short --prompt instruction.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects sandbox modes other than read-only.
criteria_results.detail: The script rejects non-read-only args.sandbox values, but the Gemini CLI argv it constructs contains --sandbox without the required read-only value, so the actual child process is not explicitly constrained to read-only.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b applies a total embedded context byte budget and marks omitted files.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows maxEmbeddedContextBytes, a shared budget object, and omitted_for_total_budget status handling in readContextFile/buildReviewContext.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects Validator-A/Codex references in refs and changed_files, not just selected phrases.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows assertValidatorBIndependence scans refs, changed_files, and previous_failures with /validator[-_]?a|codex/i.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b prompt includes the validator-result schema content or an equivalent schema contract.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows systemInstruction reads docs/schemas/validator-result.schema.json and embeds it inside validator_result_schema_json tags.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-a validates github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason as required result fields.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows validateValidatorResult requires github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason.

criteria_results.criterion: validate-handoffs discovers Validator-B fixtures without a single task-specific hardcode.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows collectFiles recursively discovers validator-b-input.json under tasks/handoffs and tasks/fixtures; no TASK-20260430-specific Validator-B fixture hardcode was found.

criteria_results.criterion: node --check, Validator-B dry-run, audit:harness, and Validator-A validation pass.
criteria_results.detail: Parent validation evidence reports passing commands, but the recorded Validator-B dry-run command shape includes --sandbox without read-only, matching the static defect in run-validator-b. Local node/npm execution was blocked by sandbox policy, so this was validated statically against the referenced files and evidence.

errors.description: Validator-B constructs a malformed Gemini CLI sandbox argument. commandArgs validates args.sandbox but returns cliArgs with '--sandbox' and never appends args.sandbox, so a live Gemini invocation receives no explicit read-only sandbox value.
errors.suggestion: Append the sandbox mode to the Gemini argv, for example include '--sandbox', args.sandbox in cliArgs, and update the dry-run/audit evidence to assert the command shape contains '--sandbox read-only'.
errors.evidence: In scripts/run-validator-b.mjs, commandArgs builds cliArgs as ['--prompt', stdinPromptInstruction, '--output-format', 'json', '--sandbox']; the only later conditional append is '--model', args.model. The spawned command uses cliArgs directly, so read-only is not passed to Gemini.

errors.description: The validation evidence accepts a Validator-B dry-run command shape that is missing the sandbox mode value, so the evidence does not prove the read-only Validator-B invocation required by the Task Spec.
errors.suggestion: Rerun Validator-B dry-run after fixing commandArgs and record evidence that the printed command includes '--sandbox read-only' while still keeping the full prompt out of argv.
errors.evidence: validation-evidence.json summarizes the dry-run command shape as 'only a short --prompt instruction plus --output-format json --sandbox'; it does not include the required read-only value.

log.result: Loaded tasks/specs/TASK-20260430-002.json and validated Tier2 success criteria scope.
Reviewed run-validator-b, run-validator-a, validate-handoffs, audit-harness, Validator-B input, and validation evidence.
node/npm validation commands were blocked by sandbox policy in this Validator-A session; parent-session evidence was considered but the static sandbox argv defect remains failing.
